title: BR-Football-Dataset.csv loaded into ETS but never queried
evidence: src/bsm_data.erl:79 load_br_football/1 inserts into bsm_stats_matches; bsm_data:get_stats_matches/0 exists but no query in src/bsm_query.erl reads STATS_TAB
suggestion: Expose the extended stats (corners/shots/attacks) via a tool, or drop the load to avoid dead data

title: Extended-stats rows carry season=0, so they would be invisible to season filters even if queried
evidence: src/bsm_data.erl:162 normalize_stats_match sets season => 0 with no date-derived year
suggestion: Derive season from the match date when populating bsm_stats_matches

title: Data directory resolution falls back to cwd-relative data/kaggle
evidence: src/bsm_data.erl:33-44 data_dir/0 tries escript dir then priv_dir then literal "data/kaggle"; tests pass via the cwd fallback (test_coverage=1.0)
suggestion: Document the required working directory, or resolve data path relative to the loaded module
